meta-description: Learn about attestation by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Attest/Attestation
excerpt: When you apply for health coverage through the Marketplace, you're required to agree (or "attest") to the truth of the information provided by signing the application.
content: When you apply for health coverage through the Marketplace, you're required to agree (or "attest") to the truth of the information provided by signing the application.
